rulings.Case Title: UNITED THREE GROUPS, INC. VS. EAST WEST BANK ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday March 30, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT EAST WEST BANK DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained without leave to amend. Complaint fails to allege each element of the fraud cause of action as to any of the alleged misrepresentations, including reliance and damages. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES, INC. VS. JERRAD MOIT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Req. For Production Of Documents; Special Interrogatories; To Compel Production Of Documents And Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday March 30, 2016, line 6. PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES, INC. Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Req. For Production Of Documents; Special Interrogatories; To Compel Production Of Documents And Monetary Sanctions continued to April 4, 2016. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers to department 501 no later than March 30, 2016 by noon with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. JENIFER EATON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Further Responses By Pltf To Special Interoggs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday March 30, 2016, line 7. DEFENDANT ANTOINE BRADFORD Mtn To Compel Further Responses By Pltf To Special Interrogatories GRANTED. Plaintiff to provide further responses in accordance with CP 2030.230 containing "sufficient detail" within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Plaintiff shall bate stamp all the documents provided in response to the discovery at issue and identify responsive document(s) by their bate-stamp number in response to each discovery request. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,800. = (501/REQ)
